message:
feat(ftui-text): add deterministic hyphenation engine with TeX pattern matching (bd-2vr05.15.2.2)

Implement Liang's TeX hyphenation algorithm: PatternTrie for O(n²) lookup,
HyphenationDict with compiled patterns + exception list, configurable left/right
margins, case-insensitive matching, and penalty integration with BreakPenalty.
Includes minimal English pattern set (100+ patterns) and 36 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
